review_title: Runecast simplifies IT Security/Vulnerability Management
description: Runecast took me less than 15 minutes to deploy on my own and needs little to no maintenance. It just works every single time. I never have any problems with it and support is always friendly and prompt when I do need help with a license issue or something. I cannot rate this product highly enough.
author: Chad L.
pros: The thing I like most about this software is its ease of use. I simply pull up the dashboard and I can visually see based on colors how severe a vulnerability is. I can then very easily drill into any of the vulnerabilities Runecast detected and get valuable information on how to mitigate the vulnerability in question.
cons: The only thing I would improve about this software is creating more "push button" compliance assessments (NIST, CMMC, etc.).

review_title: System Engineer, I design and manage IT services. Author of Nolabnoparty.com tech blog.
description: I can have the situation of my virtual environment always under control from a centralized console knowing if anything bad is occurring to the infrastructure. It allows me to save time and plan appropriate maintenance windows avoiding services disruption.
author: Paolo V.
pros: An easy to use solution, very useful to prevent potential issues on your virtual infrastructure. The well designed Dashboard allows you to have the overall status of your infrastructure from a single pane of glass. Being constantly under development, Runecast releases updates as soon as new issues or new KB are released by VMware saving the administrators from potential services disruption. Despite daily checks of the virtual infrastructure, not all issues can be detected on time. If the system has a problem, the users will have a problem. Runecast gives you the information you need to prevent potential and dangerous issues saving lot of time and keeping the environment healthy. Just think about Meltdown and Spectre issue... in large environments to identify hosts affected by this problem takes ages. With Runecast you can have the exact overview of hosts that need to be patched in a matter of seconds.
cons: No much to say about cons... for SMBs the application price perhaps can influence the purchase decision but the provided benefits are valuable. Anyway preventing issues surely cost less than fixing.

review_title: Tried last year
author: Antonin S.
pros: Easy integration and installation, everything OK.
cons: Well hard to say, its almost 2 years, but maybe price?

review_title: One stop shop, single pain or glass Best Practice and Security Advice, all in one nice panel!
description: Spent less time, consulting VMware documentation.... Log Analysis against VMware KBs, provides many fixes for issues.
author: Andrew H.
pros: It takes the pain away from VMware Administration.... it does what it says on the tin, plug and play, sit back, and then spend some time Security Hardening your VMware vSphere estate, and not forgetting following Best Practice! The real time log analysis against VMware KBs is amazing...!!!
cons: What is there not to like about Runecast Analyzer! Be prepared for a long list of todos, after it's analysed your VMware vSphere estate! It's not a software issues, because you should have been following Best Practice and Security Advice...anyway.

review_title: Overall experience was really nice. Deployment and configuration was just few clicks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The most important thing is ease of use and configuration. Recent release of vCenter plug-in made the life more easier. Routine updates and offline repository usage is one of the other important thing and it helps to maintain a more secure environment without exposing the internal network to the internet and while analyzing the security risks and best practices.
cons: To be honest, I have nothing in mind to say bad about this and overall experience was really nice so far.

review_title: Easy Ride
description: It has identified issues and bugs that i had no idea about
author: Alexis D.
pros: Its like have a Vmware Technician 24/7 auditing you Vmware Environment, its absolutely great !!!!
cons: No Alerting, if wanted alerts from logs. Hope they add these feature to a future release
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Impressive and valuable tool
description: It helps to mature and secure the vsphere environment
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I'm impressed by the easy installation in my environment with dozens of remote clusters. It runs very smooth and the first results come in before I can even finish my coffee. It finds all kind configuration issues and gives advise how to fix or improve. Currently testing with the trail version, but hope to switch to the full version soon.
cons: The version I use is not creating a trend line for the security score or index and that is useful for my reports. I got from support that it is on the roadmap for a future release.

review_title: A vital tool for maintaining uptime for your virtual environment
author: Gordon H.
pros: - The ease of installation and upgrade. Deployed in 30 minutes and upgraded in 10 - The easy to use interface and to see how many hosts are affected by a particular bug/issue - The ability to group issues into categories
cons: - Reporting could be improved. It would be nice to be able to produce a graphical report that illustrates all the issues diecovered and how many hosts are affected.

review_title: Best 3rd party software for your vSphere environnements .
description: Runecast saves hours to any Virtualization Engineer
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It does what it supposes to do : single interface to discover by referencing VMware KB articles and best practices and then help you to correct issues in your virtual infrastructures : vSphere and now NSX !!!
cons: No much to say about cons. I'd like to have a trend of historical report.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: An extremely useful pro-active problem solver, with new features being added regularly.
description: Avoiding downtime on production hypervisors, and ensuring everything is running smoothly.
author: Rob P.
pros: It does something unique by cross-referencing KB articles with your VMware estate, bringing a lot of hidden unknowns to the surface so they can be sorted before you have an issue.
cons: Just waiting on the PCI checks feature, but I understand this needs a lot of interaction with VMware themselves before they can release.

review_title: Simple platform checker
author: Gilles M.
pros: Easy to deploy and easy to use, always up to date. Very light. It's all i wanted from this kind of tool
cons: I didn't find for the moment something i don't like. It's a good sign no ? ;) I'm am not using it enough for the moment.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simply to install and use. Great features
author: Miguel Angel A.
pros: Wide functionality with vSphere, NSX and vSAN. Easy to implement and use for me and my customers. Great number of articles in Internet
cons: features like vCloud Director are important in my customers. We need this feature to monitoring vCD Machines
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Runesact usage in pharma company
author: Georgi P.
pros: It is easy to implement and use by all IT teams. what is impressive is how deep and detailed the information RuneCast provides. It helps us to quckly identify and mitigate issues.
cons: As we're working in a heavily regulated industry, compliance is critical to us Keeping our systems compliant with the regulatory standards is crucial for our IT department. It also helps us to quickly identify and fix any configuration or security parameters of our virtual infrastructures before they become a major problem. Integration of the product into our business was very easy.

review_title: The best in its league
author: Basim A.
pros: RuneCast made our life so easy. It look a job of days and turned it into minutes. Not only that, we had to ready each and every best practice document for each release and product (vSphere, vCenter, Horizon), RuneCase made it all in one. It also helped us to verify the compliance of our drivers with the release we use of ESXi as this use to be a manual process too. so easy to deploy... its OVF, assign IP and you are ready to go... so so so simple What I also love about it is that they keep on adding features without asking the customers to pay more or bring up a new license... The best value for money you will ever see in todays products.
cons: What I would like to see in RuneCast is that... Customers should be able to define their own baselines and it should compare your installation against it... currently it has built-in (vmware best practices, CIS, etc...), where what I see it should allow us to customize and run the analysis against our settings and then print it in a report format ... this will help us to showcase our compliance to audit team

review_title: Runecast at 'de Volksbank'
description: “Our main goal is to serve our customers with a high-end, feature rich and robust electronic banking environment. With Runecast we can now proactively prevent outages on the systems that provide that environment.” On average, we prevent at least one host crash (or not responding) a month. That means 20 to 30 VM’s are kept running each month instead of annoying a customer with a problem at a cash machine or doing their online of mobile banking. That alone makes it worthwhile for us! We utilize Runecast to prioritise remediation of newly detected issues in each sprint according to their level of severity. We also use it to generate concise monthly reports on the state of our virtual environment.
author: Rob V.
pros: Runecast Analyzer saves De Volksbank’s IT team 75% of time previously spent on troubleshooting and identifying root causes of issues. The tedious manual approach of crawling through VMware Knowledge Base articles has been replaced with proactive automated problem prevention.
cons: The upgrade process in the past between major versions. The move from one appliance to another keeping all settings and data.

review_title: Review
author: Yogendra S.
pros: While patching or upgrade to new version you can easily see the compatibility of firmware /drivers both hardware and software. Helps to prevent PSOD by giving the prior suggestions.
cons: A complete upgrade matrix for vSphere . by checking all the product company is using.

review_title: My experience..
author: Brad B.
pros: Its easy to use, handy to solve issues..
cons: Product keeps either losing creds or some other issue, as it periodically loses connection to various vcenters..Sometimes the interface can be overwhelming..

review_title: Great tool
author: Maurizio S.
pros: Ease of use and frequent updates. And very aeasy to set up, too.
cons: Not so easy to override an alert. Nothing else.

review_title: Really nice software which works fast, easy to maintain, good support
author: Oleg F.
pros: Nice software which allows to monitor vulnerabilities and bugs and fix them. It also has features of monitoring and analyzing logs which shows only information you need to know(errors, fails) and groups them.
cons: I would like to see more information about logs and their relation and impact on system together with KA and BP and maybe history of fixing bugs graph would looks good

review_title: Gave me a quick visual of my entire VMware environment and all the possible issues that existed
description: This product has save time in remediation as well has helped me better understand some of my initial configuration flaws.
author: Henderson A.
pros: The fact that I can see all the issues and potential issues that exist is fantastic, but to be given a direct path for remediation has same me hours of time.
cons: To be honest, I haven't found anything that I didn't like about it. It has don't everything I needed.

review_title: Very easy to implement and have useful information to optimized and secure a VMware environment
description: Saves hours of research in the VMware database, help to check compliancy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to install and configure, I have fast result with it. Whatever your environment size, admin will save hours or maybe days with this tool rather than looking for a needle in the VMware KB.
cons: Unfortunately it's only for a VMware environment, nothing for Hyper-V or Xen. When implementations allow it, it would be interesting to have a way to apply the correction easily instead of follow the VMware KB

review_title: Simple quick compliance check
description: Makes the life of an administrator
author: Stephen P.
pros: It is very easy to see where you are lacking and need to be patched. As well as categorize the different issues into their importance.
cons: It would be nice to allow automated patching of systems based on your preferences. This would make this product

review_title: Great tool to discover hidden issues within virtual infrastructure. Timesaver
description: I was able to detect issues that I wasn't aware of.
author: Michael S.
pros: simple deployment simple configuration simple update process offline update possible good visualization of issues
cons: no defined way to contact support. I did it via Twitter and then I got excellent support. They're should be a contact form on the website or within Runecast to open a ticket.

review_title: Evaluated this product within test and production environments
author: Austen S.
pros: It is everything the VMware Health Analyzer tried to be and much more. The comprehensive coverage of applicable KB articles, DISA STIG and best practises summarised across infrastructure qualities makes reporting current states effortless. Also, from a security perspective, the offline capability is priceless.
cons: I wish the product had been around years ago. Not much else I can really say about what I don't like about it.

review_title: The software reduces the time needed to follow KBs to minimum.
author: Vedran B.
pros: The software reduces the time needed to follow KBs to minimum filtering out irrelevant KBs to your VMware cloud....
cons: It would be nice if it would monitor driver / firmware changes, KBs, matrix of compatibility for hardware.
author_profession: Leading engineer for support of Data Center
